title: Relationship-based school scoping for lookup tables without school_id
business_reason: The school lookup only scoped tables that carry school_id directly (plus a hand-coded exam_slots case); everything else returned empty. Generalize: scope a table to the authenticated school through its relationships, so future school pickers work — still with zero cross-school leak.

design.generated_map: gen_ui.emit_school_scope -> server/lookups/schoolScope.generated.ts: per FK-target table a strategy — direct (has school_id) | parent (one-hop FK to a school-scoped parent, scope via parent.school_id) | junction (hand-verified school-scoped junction, e.g. exam_slots via school_exam_slot_assignments) | none (global catalog or staff-only -> empty).
design.safety: junctions are NOT auto-inferred — auto-detection picked arbitrary first-match junctions (e.g. exam_slots->evaluation_import_batches, staff_profiles via an actor_id) that were semantically wrong or staff-exposing. Only the hand-verified exam_slots junction is configured; everything else is direct/parent (a real FK) or none. parent/junction filter by the school's OWN parent/link ids, so the result can never include another school's rows.
design.endpoint: /api/school/lookup/[table] reads SCHOOL_SCOPE and applies direct/parent/junction/none generically (replacing the one-off exam_slots branch).

param_14.question: Are lookup tables without a school_id scoped to the school?
param_14.answer: Yes. A generated SCHOOL_SCOPE map gives each FK-target table a scoping strategy: directly by school_id, via a one-hop FK to a school-scoped parent (e.g. exam_materials through its participation), via a hand-verified junction (exam_slots through the school's slot assignments), or — for global catalog / staff-only tables — empty. Verified live: participations/exam_slots return the school's 1 row, parent tables filter to the school's own records, and a second school with no tickets sees 0 ticket-messages (not the other school's 30). No cross-school leak.
param_14.security_implications: parent/junction scope by the school's OWN parent/link ids (never the browser's school_id); junctions are hand-verified, not auto-inferred, to avoid wrong/staff-exposing relationships; un-scopable tables return empty.
param_14.downstream_dependencies: multi-hop scoping if a future picker needs it; picker search/pagination.

verify: cross-school: a school with 0 tickets sees 0 ticket-messages
